headline: With Nike Stock Deep in Oversold Territory, Should You Buy the Dip?
summary: Nike stock is sinking as disappointing guidance and longer-than-expected turnaround timelines continue to hurt sentiment. Truist explains why now is a great time to load up on NKE shares.
